Copper - Regime State

A Deterministic Summary of Copper Macro Regime Conditions.

As of 2026-03-14

Gemini Summary

Copper Regime State — Deterministic Summary
Primary Regime Classification Risk-Off / Stress Dominant
Growth & Demand Regime Neutral (Signals for Global Growth, China Activity, and Manufacturing PMI are missing or mixed)
Liquidity Regime Neutral (Federal Reserve Liquidity (1) and M2 Money Supply (2) are Neutral)
USD Regime Weakening (USD Index (3) and USD CoT (4) are Bearish/Short-Biased)
Stress State Elevated (Financial Stress Index (5) is Bearish; VIX (6) is Stressed)
Directional Bias (1-Month) Bearish (Stress logic dominates (5); Copper CoT indicates Bearish Reversal Risk (7))
Directional Bias (3-Month) Bearish (Driven by persistent elevated stress (6) and restrictive Real Interest Rate Trend (8))
Active Conflict Flags YES (USD Weakening (3) vs. Restrictive Real Rates (8) and Elevated Stress (5))
Deterministic Rules Triggered:
  • Stress Override Logic: Elevated Stress (5)(6) forces cyclical risk-off dominance and mutes neutral liquidity effects.
  • Positioning Adjustment: Copper positioning flagged for Bearish Reversal Risk (7) and Moderate Exhaustion Risk (9) confirms downside asymmetry.
  • Liquidity Regime: M2 (2) and Fed Liquidity (1) neutrality prevents expansionary amplification.
The information presented is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute financial or investment advice. It has been prepared without regard to individual objectives, financial situation, or needs. You should consider whether it is appropriate for your circumstances and seek independent advice where necessary.
